mapper.select: SELECT p.id, p.research_id, p.title, p.author_role, p.author_order, p.journal_name, p.publication_level, p.journal_partition, p.published_year, p.indexed_info FROM student_publication p INNER JOIN student_research_experience r ON r.id = p.research_id WHERE r.user_id = #{userId} ORDER BY p.id ASC
mapper.delete: DELETE p FROM student_publication p INNER JOIN student_research_experience r ON r.id = p.research_id WHERE r.user_id = #{userId}
